narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township Q (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,103 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points.
